description: CompositionRinse washed black bottoms made of 73% cotton, 24% polyester and 3% spandex, with an elasticated waist, stitch detailing and two pockets at the backFittingSlimWash careMachine or hand wash separately using a mild detergent onlyDo not bleach or wringDry in shadeMedium ironSlim is in!
